reasoning: The control AC-24(1) focuses on ensuring that access authorization information is securely transmitted. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring secure transmission through TLS for API server communications, enforcing TLS in NetworkPolicies for secure pod-to-pod communication, enabling TLS for Ingress resources to secure external traffic, and using mutual TLS (mTLS) in service meshes for secure service-to-service communication.
title: Access Control Decisions - Access control decisions | transmit access authorization information transmit [
